content.full_text:
/

i 4 D 00

Office of City Clerk
P.O.Bin 1701,El Centro,Ca.
FPPC 92243
May 11,1978

Please advise if a Committee which was supporting various candidates for the March 7, 1978 election and has reported and completed returns...with no further activity for the municipal candidate, must continue to file with the City when they are now supporting candidates only for the June primary.... Or are returns only to be made to the filing officer for the June election...
Thank you for an answer to this question.

Celia Sweeden, City Clerk


78 - [illegible]
D 51


(6) Celia Sweeden — Responded by phone. The committee is required
to file statements only with appropriate filing officers in
connection with the June election.

Thank you for an answer to this question.

                                        Celia Sweeden, City Clerk


                                        78 [illegible]
                                           591


(6)  Celia Sweeden -- Responded by phone.  The committee is required
to file statements only with appropriate filing officers in
connection with the June election.
